ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record label of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the album in seconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a single */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "formed_date" TEXT /* Date the artist or band was formed */,
  "disbanded_date" TEXT /* Date the band disbanded (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_descriptors" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the recommendation algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_genres" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_artists" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_albums" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_stats" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the album */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the album */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the album */,
  "num_listens" INTEGER /* Number of times the album has been listened to */,
  "num_favorites" INTEGER /* Number of users who have added the album to their favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_stats" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "num_albums" INTEGER /* Number of albums by the artist */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the artist */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the artist */,
  "num_listens" INTEGER /* Total number of listens for all albums by the artist */,
  "num_favorites" INTEGER /* Number of users who have added any of the artist's albums to their favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_stats" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "num_albums" INTEGER /* Number of albums in the genre */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the genre */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the genre */,
  "num_listens" INTEGER /* Total number of listens for all albums in the genre */,
  "num_favorites" INTEGER /* Number of users who have added any album in the genre to their favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
